name: Chocolate Peppermint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add the peppermint flavoring and egg whites, and mix at medium speed for 1 minute, scraping the bowl before and after adding each ingredient.
3. Stir the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt together to blend well; then add to the creamy mixture.
4. Mix at medium speed until well blended.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours to overnight.
6. Return dough to room temperature.
7. Roll out on a lightly floured board to 1/4 inch thick.
8. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch round cutter or an equivalent cutter.
9. Place cookies on sheets sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
10. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are almost firm.
11. Remove cookies to a wire rack and cool to room temperature.
NOTE: Cookies will be soft if kept in an airtight container. If you want them crisp, freeze them or keep them in a container that isn't airtight.
Food exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 115, Fat: 5g, Carbohydrates: 16g, Sodium: 98mg, Protein: 2g, Cholesterol: 0
